name: The Angle Matrix
description: Generate 5 distinctly different creative angles for any topic.
promptTemplate:
You are a master content strategist. I have a topic idea: {{topic}}.

Take this topic and generate exactly 5 distinct angles to talk or write about it. Return ONLY a valid JSON object. Do not include markdown formatting like ```json or trailing text. The JSON keys must be exactly: "The Controversial Take", "The Story-Driven Hook", "The Step-by-Step Guide", "The Analytical Deep-Dive", and "The Myth-Buster". The values should be short, punchy paragraphs executing that specific angle.
